pr-evidence/release-bundle-github-govern.gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 review found two fail-closed schema gaps for GitHub governance sidecars: unsupported nested raw payloads and raw objects under allowed summary fields. Both were fixed with explicit nested allowlists, scalar/list type checks, and regression tests; re-review approved with no merge blockers.
scope: document_kv_cache.release_bundle, restaurant_kv_serving.release_bundle facade, benchmark_plan release-bundle config, README docs, release bundle and benchmark plan tests.
verification: secret scan completed; only existing detector fixtures and prior evidence text matched, no live credentials found
what_changed: Added GitHub repository governance sidecar support to release bundles, including direct and legacy CLI flags plus benchmark-plan pass-through.
pr-evidence/release-bundle-github-govern.why: Release bundles already required PR evidence; this makes repository visibility and main-branch protection evidence a validated, bundled release artifact instead of a loose manual check.
